name: Landing page loads and displays sign-up CTA
description: Verify the Nora landing page renders correctly with the hero section, feature cards, and a visible sign-up button that navigates to the registration page.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at the target URL
Wait for the page to fully load including the hero section with the heading text
Verify the page displays a heading containing the text 'study buddy' and a 'Get Started' or 'Start studying free' button is visible
Click the 'Start studying free' or 'Get Started' button
Verify the browser navigates to a sign-up page with an email input field and a submit button visible
